criteria.factual_accuracy: Claims are correct and verifiable from cited sources (1=fabricated claims, 5=all claims verified)
criteria.citations: Every claim has a source URL; sources are accessible (1=no citations, 5=comprehensive sourcing)
criteria.completeness: All sub-questions answered; no major gaps (1=most questions unanswered, 5=thorough coverage)
criteria.source_quality: Official docs > blogs > tutorials > forums; recent > old (1=only forums/outdated, 5=authoritative and current)
criteria.efficiency: Reasonable number of tool calls for query complexity (1=excessive or insufficient, 5=well-calibrated effort)
